meta.game: World of Warcraft Classic: Mists of Pandaria
meta.purpose: Always-profitable craft targets kept separate from the class/spec demand map.
notes: This file uses the same planner schema as class_spec_items.json so the scripts can merge both datasets.
These crafts are cross-expansion markets driven by utility, prestige, or legacy material demand rather than spec-specific gearing demand.
Ranks are local priority for this always-profit list.

Vial of the Sands.reason: High-ticket prestige mount with durable legacy demand

Illusionary Bag.reason: Premium Cataclysm bag with steady utility demand

Embersilk Bag.reason: Fast-moving 22-slot bag with broad alt demand

Netherweave Bag.reason: Low-capital legacy bag with constant baseline demand

Truegold.reason: Key Cataclysm transmute feeding Vial of the Sands and other legacy crafts

Frostweave Bag.reason: Reliable Wrath bag seller with a straightforward cloth chain

Glacial Bag.reason: Premium Wrath bag with specialty-cloth scarcity support

Mysterious Fortune Card.reason: Speculative inscription craft worth checking only when margins still hold

always_profit_all.note: All always-profit legacy crafts in one group.
